product.name: Curtain Rods 72-144 Inch, 1" Heavy Duty Adjustable Curtain Rod for Windows, Black Extra Long Window Treatment Rod, Modern Design, Easy Installation
features: 𝗛𝗲𝗮𝘃𝘆-𝗗𝘂𝘁𝘆 𝗪𝗲𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗶𝘁𝘆: Features premium thickened steel construction with reinforced internal structure that easily supports up to 30lbs - perfect for heavyweight blackout curtains, thermal drapes, and luxurious velvet curtains without bending or sagging. Ideal for master bedrooms and living rooms

𝗔𝗱𝗷𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗟𝗲𝗻𝗴𝘁𝗵 𝗥𝗼𝗱: This telescopic and extendable rod is fully adjustable from 18 to 144 inches, ensuring a perfect fit for various window widths without custom sizing. This saves time and cost while offering flexible installation solutions for diverse home layouts

𝗥𝘂𝘀𝘁-𝗥𝗲𝘀𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁 & 𝗟𝗼𝗻𝗴-𝗟𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴: These window treatment rods feature a triple-layer coating system that offers excellent oxidation and scratch resistance, making them completely rust proof, and specially formulated matte finish withstands high humidity and daily wear from curtain rings

𝗦𝗹𝗲𝗲𝗸 𝗕𝗹𝗮𝗰𝗸 𝗖𝘂𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻 𝗥𝗼𝗱: Premium matte black finish adds modern elegance to any room. Understated design complements your decor while the scratch-resistant coating maintains a like-new appearance for years
𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Easy installation with included accessories—wall mounting requires drilling holes; all screws and expansion bolts are provided. Setup takes less than 10 minutes
